steps.title: Remove parentheses and organize by degree
steps.content:
Write out all terms:
$$9x^3 + 5x + 7 + 6x^3 + 5x^2 - 5$$
Group like terms together:
$$(9x^3 + 6x^3) + 5x^2 + 5x + (7 - 5)$$

steps.title: Add coefficients within each group
steps.content:
For each degree level:
  • $x^3$ terms: $9 + 6 = 15$
  • $x^2$ terms: \$5$ (only one)
  • $x$ terms: \$5$ (only one)
  • Constants: $7 - 5 = 2$
Result: $$15x^3 + 5x^2 + 5x + 2$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
